description: Graphite is a code-review and pull-request workflow product built around stacked pull requests for GitHub repositories. It provides developer tooling for creating, updating, and managing PR stacks from the command line and through AI-assisted workflows.
summary: Graphite exposes a developer CLI (`gt`) and a stdio MCP server built into that CLI (`gt mcp`); both use the same Graphite CLI auth token. No public HTTP/REST or GraphQL API documentation was found.
